subcodes.first_line: O luminous leaf! Thy name is Radiance, and, God willing, thy countenance and nature shall be the light of God, such that from thy brow shall shine forth light [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه نورانیه اسمت ضیاست و انشاء الله رویت و خویت نور خدا یعنی از جبینت نور
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @radiant countenance; bearing the divine fragrance, @being a source of light; guidance
